hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】美联储在杰罗姆·鲍威尔担任主席的最后一次会议上维持利率不变；【CRYPTO】美联储维持利率不变，比特币跌至 75,000 美元，持不同政见者冷淡 Warsh 的“枢轴党”；【CRYPTO】凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 通过了参议院银行委员会的关键投票，成为美联储主席。

items.title: Fed leaves rates unchanged at Jerome Powell's final meeting as chairman
items.summary: The U.S. Federal Reserve's next meeting in June is likely to be led by Kevin Warsh after he cleared a Senate Banking Committee vote on Wednesday.
items.title_zh: 美联储在杰罗姆·鲍威尔担任主席的最后一次会议上维持利率不变
items.summary_zh: 周三，凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 通过了参议院银行委员会的投票后，美联储 6 月的下一次会议可能会由凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 主持。

items.title: Bitcoin slips to $75,000 as Fed holds rates, dissenters chill Warsh ‘pivot party’
items.summary: A split 8-4 vote initially spooked markets, creating uncertainty around the Federal Reserve's future policy moves.
items.title_zh: 美联储维持利率不变，比特币跌至 75,000 美元，持不同政见者冷淡 Warsh 的“枢轴党”
items.summary_zh: 8:4 的分歧最初令市场感到恐慌，给美联储未来的政策举措带来了不确定性。

items.title: Kevin Warsh clears key Senate Banking Committee vote to become Federal Reserve chair
items.summary: The Senate Banking Committee voted to approve Federal Reserve Chair pick Kevin Warsh's nomination, sending it to the full Senate.
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 通过了参议院银行委员会的关键投票，成为美联储主席
items.summary_zh: 参议院银行委员会投票批准了美联储主席凯文·沃什的提名，并将其提交参议院全体会议。

items.title: Fed holds rates steady but with highest level of dissent since 1992
items.summary: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released its latest decision on interest rates.
items.title_zh: 美联储维持利率稳定，但反对声音达到1992年以来最高水平
items.summary_zh: 美联储周三公布了最新的利率决定。

items.title: Here's everything to expect when the Fed issues its latest interest rate decision Wednesday
items.summary: In what could be Jerome Powell's final meeting as Fed chair, he and his fellow policymakers are likely to continue their cautious approach.
items.title_zh: 美联储周三发布最新利率决定时，所有值得期待的事情都在这里
items.summary_zh: 这可能是杰罗姆·鲍威尔作为美联储主席的最后一次会议，他和他的政策制定者同行可能会继续采取谨慎的态度。

items.title: Jamie Dimon warns of 'some kind of bond crisis' ahead as global debt risks build
items.summary: Dimon, who runs JPMorgan Chase, the world's largest bank by market cap, said that today's growing mix of risks could combine in unpredictable ways.
items.title_zh: 杰米·戴蒙警告称，随着全球债务风险的加剧，未来将出现“某种债券危机”
items.summary_zh: 戴蒙是全球市值最大的银行摩根大通的负责人，他表示，当今日益增长的风险组合可能会以不可预测的方式结合起来。

items.title: Fed chair Jerome Powell says he will stay on as Govenor after term amid legal pressure
items.summary: During a press conference following the Fed's interest rate decision, Powell said ongoing scrutiny and political tension forced him to stay, despite his plans to step down.
items.title_zh: 美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔表示，在法律压力下，他将在任期结束后继续担任美联储理事
items.summary_zh: 鲍威尔在美联储利率决定后的新闻发布会上表示，尽管他计划辞职，但持续的审查和政治紧张局势迫使他留下来。

items.title: OpenAI available at FedRAMP Moderate
items.summary: OpenAI is available at FedRAMP Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API, enabling secure AI adoption for U.S. federal agencies.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 在 FedRAMP 中可用
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 可通过 FedRAMP 对 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 OpenAI API 进行中等授权，从而为美国联邦机构提供安全的 AI 采用。

items.title: MoonPay acquires crypto key manager Sodot, launches institutional business led by former CFTC acting chair
items.summary: Former acting CFTC Chair Caroline Pham will lead MoonPay's new division focused on banks, asset managers, and trading firms.
items.title_zh: MoonPay 收购加密密钥管理公司 Sodot，推出由前 CFTC 代理主席领导的机构业务
items.summary_zh: CFTC 前代理主席 Caroline Pham 将领导 MoonPay 的新部门，专注于银行、资产管理公司和贸易公司。

items.title: Enabling privacy-preserving AI training on everyday devices
items.summary: A new method could bring more accurate and efficient AI models to high-stakes applications like health care and finance, even in under-resourced settings.
items.title_zh: 在日常设备上启用保护隐私的人工智能训练
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以为医疗保健和金融等高风险应用带来更准确、更高效的人工智能模型，即使在资源贫乏的环境中也是如此。

items.title: Jacob Andreas and Brett McGuire named Edgerton Award winners
items.summary: The associate professors of EECS and chemistry, respectively, are honored for exceptional contributions to teaching, research, and service at MIT.
items.title_zh: 雅各布·安德烈亚斯和布雷特·麦奎尔被评为埃哲顿奖获得者
items.summary_zh: EECS 和化学副教授分别因对麻省理工学院的教学、研究和服务做出的杰出贡献而受到表彰。

items.title: Human-machine teaming dives underwater
items.summary: Researchers are developing hardware and algorithms to improve collaboration between divers and autonomous underwater vehicles engaged in maritime missions.
items.title_zh: 人机协作潜入水下
items.summary_zh: 研究人员正在开发硬件和算法，以改善潜水员和执行海上任务的自主水下航行器之间的协作。

items.title: Jerome Powell says he will continue to serve as a Fed governor, calls Trump criticism 'unprecedented'
items.summary: Powell addressed the question of whether he will stay on as a Board of Governors member after his term as chair ends.
items.title_zh: 杰罗姆·鲍威尔表示，他将继续担任美联储理事，称特朗普的批评“史无前例”
items.summary_zh: 鲍威尔谈到了在主席任期结束后是否继续担任理事会成员的问题。

items.title: PayPal's new CEO makes Venmo a standalone business unit as potential buyers circle
items.summary: PayPal is betting that a new corporate structure can reignite growth at a company that has lost ground to Apple, Google and Stripe in the e-commerce battle.
items.title_zh: 随着潜在买家的青睐，PayPal 新任首席执行官将 Venmo 打造为独立业务部门
items.summary_zh: PayPal 认为，新的公司结构可以重新激发这家在电子商务之战中输给苹果、谷歌和 Stripe 的公司的增长。

items.title: Here's what changed in the new Fed statement
items.summary: This is a comparison of Wednesday's Federal Open Market Committee statement with the one issued after the Fed's previous policymaking meeting in March.
items.title_zh: 这是新的美联储声明中的变化
items.summary_zh: 这是周三联邦公开市场委员会声明与美联储 3 月份上一次决策会议后发布的声明的比较。

items.title: Traders brace for $800 billion in earnings-related stock movement
items.summary: Wenesday night is the main event for earnings season, with Alphabet, Amazon, Meta and Microsoft – four of the "Magnificent Seven" — set to report.
items.title_zh: 交易员准备迎接与收益相关的 8000 亿美元的股票走势
items.summary_zh: 周三晚上是财报季的重头戏，Alphabet、亚马逊、Meta 和微软——“七巨头”中的四家——将公布财报。

items.title: Kalshi bettors called it: Powell says he will stay on as Fed governor after chair term ends
items.summary: Bettors on the platform don't think Powell will leave until August. If he stays on until then, he'd attend two more meetings of the FOMC.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希投注者称：鲍威尔表示，他将在主席任期结束后继续担任美联储理事
items.summary_zh: 该平台上的投注者认为鲍威尔要到八月才会离开。如果他留任到那时，他将再参加两次联邦公开市场委员会会议。

items.title: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square USA fund falls sharply in public market debut
items.summary: The listing gives public investors their first direct stake in Ackman's investment platform, which runs a concentrated portfolio of 10 large-cap names.
items.title_zh: 比尔·阿克曼的潘兴广场美国基金在公开市场首次亮相时大幅下跌
items.summary_zh: 此次上市让公众投资者首次直接持有阿克曼投资平台的股份，该平台运营着由 10 家大盘股组成的集中投资组合。

items.title: Oil price briefly hits $120 after reports of 'extended' Iran blockade
items.summary: The price of crude oil has swung sharply as uncertainty over the war in the Middle East continues.
items.title_zh: 有报道称伊朗“延长”封锁后油价短暂触及 120 美元
items.summary_zh: 由于中东战争的不确定性持续存在，原油价格大幅波动。

items.title: Russia scales back Moscow Victory Day parade, blaming threat from Ukraine
items.summary: Russia says the annual commemoration of Soviet victory in World War Two will not feature military vehicles or cadets.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯缩减莫斯科胜利日阅兵规模，指责乌克兰威胁
items.summary_zh: 俄罗斯表示，苏联在第二次世界大战中胜利的年度纪念活动不会有军用车辆或学员。

items.title: Gallows Humor Provides Respite From Mideast Wars
items.summary: Arab digital creators on social media are turning out edgy material to cope with the conflicts and bring levity to a pain that often feels too raw.
items.title_zh: 绞刑架幽默为中东战争提供了喘息的机会
items.summary_zh: 社交媒体上的阿拉伯数字创作者正​​在创作前卫的材料来应对冲突，并为常常让人感觉过于原始的痛苦带来轻快的感觉。

items.title: Paraguay Says It’s Not Abandoning Taiwan. China Has Other Plans.
items.summary: Beijing is trying to unravel an unlikely long-distance relationship that has endured for decades. Could Paraguay be tempted to stray?
items.title_zh: 巴拉圭表示不会放弃台湾。中国还有其他计划。
items.summary_zh: 北京正试图解开一种看似不太可能的、持续了数十年的远距离关系。巴拉圭会受到诱惑而迷失吗？

items.title: Trump’s Clash With Merz Shows It’s Hard to Stay Friends With the President
items.summary: Throughout the war in Iran, Friedrich Merz, the German chancellor, did all he could to keep President Trump happy. This week, Mr. Merz appeared to lose patience.
items.title_zh: 特朗普与梅尔茨的冲突表明与总统保持朋友很难
items.summary_zh: 在伊朗战争期间，德国总理弗里德里希·梅尔茨竭尽全力让特朗普总统高兴。本周，默茨先生似乎失去了耐心。

items.title: Russia’s Victory Day Parade Will Be Missing Tanks and Other Heavy Military Armor
items.summary: The absence of tanks and other heavy military vehicles on Red Square will highlight the heavy toll of the war in Ukraine.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯胜利日阅兵将缺少坦克和其他重型军用装甲
items.summary_zh: 红场上没有坦克和其他重型军车将凸显乌克兰战争造成的惨重伤亡。

items.title: JPMorgan hires former Goldman Sachs exec for Kinexys. Here is why he believes tokenization is only half the battle
items.summary: JPMorgan’s new crypto head Oliver Harris has previously warned that tokenizing assets isn't a magic fix for liquidity, but believes the technology is finally ready to "rip out" and replace the financial industry's legacy back end.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通为 Kinexys 聘请了前高盛高管。这就是为什么他认为代币化只是成功的一半
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通新任加密货币主管奥利弗·哈里斯（Oliver Harris）此前曾警告称，资产代币化并不是解决流动性的灵丹妙药，但他相信该技术终于准备好“淘汰”并取代金融业的传统后端。

items.title: Celsius founder Alex Mashinsky reaches $10 million FTC settlement with lifetime crypto industry ban
items.summary: A large portion of the judgment was suspended, leaving Mashinsky on the hook for $10 million.
items.title_zh: elsel 创始人 Alex Mashinsky 与 FTC 达成 1000 万美元和解，并终生禁止加密行业
items.summary_zh: 判决的很大一部分被暂停，马辛斯基因此承担了 1000 万美元的责任。

items.title: Visa stablecoin settlement hits $7 billion run rate as pilot expands to nine blockchains
items.summary: Visa added five blockchains to its stablecoin settlement pilot as annualized volume reached $7 billion, up 50% from last quarter.
items.title_zh: 随着试点范围扩大到九个区块链，Visa 稳定币结算运行率达到 70 亿美元
items.summary_zh: Visa 在其稳定币结算试点中增加了 5 个区块链，年化交易量达到 70 亿美元，比上季度增长 50%。

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.5
items.summary: Introducing GPT-5.5, our smartest model yet—faster, more capable, and built for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis across tools.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5 简介
items.summary_zh: 隆重推出 GPT-5.5，这是我们迄今为止最智能的模型，速度更快、功能更强大，专为跨工具编码、研究和数据分析等复杂任务而构建。

items.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
items.summary: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.
items.title_zh: 庆祝 Google 翻译 20 周年：有趣的事实、提示和值得尝试的新功能
items.summary_zh: 谷歌分享了 20 个有趣的事实来庆祝谷歌翻译成立 20 周年，从 2006 年的人工智能实验到如今支持近 250 种语言。

items.title: 3 new ways Ads Advisor is making Google Ads safer and faster
items.summary: Three new agentic safety and policy features integrated into Ads Advisor will help protect and streamline your Google Ads account.
items.title_zh: Ads Advisor 让 Google Ads 更安全、更快速的 3 种新方法
items.summary_zh: Ads Advisor 中集成的三项新的代理安全和政策功能将有助于保护和简化您的 Google Ads 帐户。

items.title: New ways to create personalized images in the Gemini app
items.summary: Nano Banana 2 now uses your personal context and Google Photos to create images that reflect your unique life.
items.title_zh: 在 Gemini 应用程序中创建个性化图像的新方法
items.summary_zh: Nano Banana 2 现在使用您的个人背景和 Google Photos 来创建反映您独特生活的图像。

items.title: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab launches to shape the future of AI and quantum computing
items.summary: Building on a long-standing MIT–IBM collaboration, the new lab will chart the convergence of AI, algorithms, and quantum computing.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM 计算研究实验室成立，塑造人工智能和量子计算的未来
items.summary_zh: 新实验室建立在 MIT 与 IBM 长期合作的基础上，将绘制人工智能、算法和量子计算的融合图。

items.title: A faster way to estimate AI power consumption
items.summary: The “EnergAIzer” method generates reliable results in seconds, enabling data center operators to efficiently allocate resources and reduce wasted energy.
items.title_zh: 更快地估算 AI 功耗的方法
items.summary_zh: “EnergAIzer”方法可在几秒钟内生成可靠的结果，使数据中心运营商能够有效地分配资源并减少能源浪费。

items.title: Bringing AI-driven protein-design tools to biologists everywhere
items.summary: Founded by Tristan Bepler PhD ’20 and former MIT professor Tim Lu PhD ’07, OpenProtein.AI offers researchers open-source models and other tools for protein engineering.
items.title_zh: 为世界各地的生物学家带来人工智能驱动的蛋白质设计工具
items.summary_zh: OpenProtein.AI 由 Tristan Bepler 博士 '20 和前麻省理工学院教授 Tim Lu 博士 '07 创立，为研究人员提供开源模型和其他蛋白质工程工具。

items.title: Eric Trump says bitcoin in its 'greatest period ever' as Wall Street falls in line
items.summary: Speaking at Bitcoin Las Vegas 2026, the American Bitcoin co-founder declared the last six months a turning point.
items.title_zh: 埃里克·特朗普称比特币正处于“有史以来最伟大的时期”，华尔街也纷纷效仿
items.summary_zh: 这位美国比特币联合创始人在 2026 年拉斯维加斯比特币大会上发表讲话时宣称，过去六个月是一个转折点。

items.title: Bitcoin's widely tracked Coinbase Premium turns negative as realized losses spike to $6 billion
items.summary: A metric tracking U.S. spot demand has flipped red just as onchain data shows realized losses surging to $5.97 billion.
items.title_zh: 随着已实现损失飙升至 60 亿美元，比特币广泛追踪的 Coinbase 溢价转为负值
items.summary_zh: 就在链上数据显示已实现损失飙升至 59.7 亿美元之际，追踪美国现货需求的指标已变成红色。

items.title: Our commitment to community safety
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI protects community safety in ChatGPT through model safeguards, misuse detection, policy enforcement, and collaboration with safety experts.
items.title_zh: 我们对社区安全的承诺
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 如何通过模型保障、误用检测、策略执行以及与安全专家的协作来保护 ChatGPT 中的社区安全。

items.title: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
items.summary: OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 模型、Codex 和托管代理来到 AWS
items.summary_zh: OpenAI GPT 模型、Codex 和托管代理现已在 AWS 上提供，使企业能够在其 AWS 环境中构建安全的 AI。

items.title: The next phase of the Microsoft OpenAI partnership
items.summary: OpenAI and Microsoft announce an amended agreement that simplifies the partnership, adds long-term clarity, and supports continued AI innovation at scale.
items.title_zh: Microsoft OpenAI 合作伙伴关系的下一阶段
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和微软宣布了一项修订后的协议，该协议简​​化了合作伙伴关系，增加了长期清晰度，并支持大规模的持续人工智能创新。

items.title: We're launching two specialized TPUs for the agentic era.
items.summary: The eighth generation of Google’s TPU includes two specialized chips that will power the future of AI.
items.title_zh: 我们正在推出两款针对代理时代的专用 TPU。
items.summary_zh: 第八代谷歌 TPU 包括两个专用芯片，将为人工智能的未来提供动力。

items.title: A new way to explore the web with AI Mode in Chrome
items.summary: Today’s upgrades for AI Mode in Chrome transform how you interact with the web
items.title_zh: 通过 Chrome 中的 AI 模式探索网络的新方式
items.summary_zh: 今天 Chrome 中 AI 模式的升级改变了您与网络交互的方式

items.title: MIT scientists build the world’s largest collection of Olympiad-level math problems, and open it to everyone
items.summary: New dataset of 30,000-plus competition math problems from 47 countries gives AI researchers a harder test — and students worldwide a better training ground.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的科学家们建立了世界上最大的奥林匹克级数学问题集，并向所有人开放
items.summary_zh: 来自 47 个国家的 30,000 多个竞赛数学问题的新数据集为人工智能研究人员提供了更难的测试，也为世界各地的学生提供了更好的训练场。

items.title: Teaching AI models to say “I’m not sure”
items.summary: A new training method improves the reliability of AI confidence estimates without sacrificing performance, addressing a root cause of hallucination in reasoning models.
items.title_zh: 教人工智能模型说“我不确定”
items.summary_zh: 一种新的训练方法在不牺牲性能的情况下提高了人工智能置信度估计的可靠性，解决了推理模型中产生幻觉的根本原因。

items.title: A philosophy of work
items.summary: As the NC Ethics of Technology Postdoctoral Fellow, Michal Masny is advancing dialogue, teaching, and research into the social and ethical dimensions of new computing technologies.
items.title_zh: 工作哲学
items.summary_zh: 作为北卡罗来纳州技术伦理学博士后研究员，Michal Masny 正在推进新计算技术的社会和伦理层面的对话、教学和研究。

items.title: Startup Blockworks wants to become the crypto equivalent of Morningstar. How it plans to do it
items.summary: Blockworks wants to position itself as the main data provider for the world of digital assets in a bid to attract more investors to the asset class.
items.title_zh: 初创公司 Blockworks 希望成为加密货币领域的晨星 (Morningstar)。计划如何做
items.summary_zh: Blockworks 希望将自己定位为数字资产领域的主要数据提供商，以吸引更多投资者进入该资产类别。

items.title: Comey surrenders over charge of threatening Trump's life in Instagram post
items.summary: Prosecutors say a 2025 seashell photo posted by the former FBI director was a call for violence against Trump.
items.title_zh: 科米因在 Instagram 帖子中威胁特朗普生命的指控而自首
items.summary_zh: 检察官称，前联邦调查局局长发布的一张 2025 年贝壳照片是在呼吁对特朗普实施暴力。

items.title: Hungary's next PM says frozen EU funds will be paid out soon
items.summary: Péter Magyar meets EU leaders in Brussels, for the first time since his Tisza party won a landslide election.
items.title_zh: 匈牙利下一任总理表示冻结的欧盟资金将很快支付
items.summary_zh: 彼得·马扎尔 (Péter Magyar) 在布鲁塞尔会见欧盟领导人，这是自他的蒂萨政党赢得压倒性选举以来的首次。

items.title: New images show suspect taking selfies before Washington press dinner shooting
items.summary: Prosecutors argue Cole Tomas Allen should remain in custody until trial on a charge of attempted assassination of President Donald Trump.
items.title_zh: 新图像显示嫌疑人在华盛顿新闻晚宴枪击事件前自拍
items.summary_zh: 检察官认为，科尔·托马斯·艾伦应继续被拘留，直至因企图刺杀唐纳德·特朗普总统的指控而受审。

items.title: Seven lawsuits filed against OpenAI by families of Canada mass-shooting victims
items.summary: The lawsuits, filed in California, accuse OpenAI and Sam Altman of negligence and abetting a mass shooting by failing to flag the suspect's ChatGPT activity.
items.title_zh: 加拿大大规模枪击事件受害者家属对 OpenAI 提起七起诉讼
items.summary_zh: 这些诉讼在加利福尼亚州提起，指控 OpenAI 和 Sam Altman 疏忽大意，未能标记嫌疑人的 ChatGPT 活动，从而煽动大规模枪击事件。

items.title: Madagascar detains French national over alleged plot to stir unrest
items.summary: Malagasy prosecuters used a Whatsapp group as evidence for the detained individuals alleged crimes.
items.title_zh: 马达加斯加因涉嫌策划煽动骚乱而拘留法国国民
items.summary_zh: 马达加斯加检察官使用 Whatsapp 群组作为被拘留者涉嫌犯罪的证据。

items.title: Stranded whale ferried out of German waters in barge
items.summary: The final operation to save the whale is being closely followed, after the failure of earlier attempts.

items.summary_zh: 在早期尝试失败后，目前正在密切关注拯救鲸鱼的最后行动。

items.summary: Jeffrey Epstein’s messages cast light on an unusual building on his private island and show how his connections helped him secure tapestries from Mecca for it.

items.title: U.S. Indictment Accuses Mexican Governor of Conspiring With Sinaloa Cartel
items.summary: Prosecutors accused Rubén Rocha Moya, the governor of Sinaloa state, and other Mexican officials of a yearslong scheme to protect the powerful drug cartel.

items.title: Stabbing in Jewish Area in North London Treated as a Terrorist Incident, Police Say
items.summary: Two men who were stabbed in Golders Green on Wednesday were in stable condition, the police said. One man was arrested on suspicion of attempted murder.

items.summary: The victim had protested against the widening role of the military, which activists say is reminiscent of the country’s decades-long dictatorship.

items.title: U.K.'s Farage faces standards probe over $6.7 million gift from Tether billionaire Christopher Harborne
